name: pro-diary-os-vercel-backend
description: Professional Diary OS Backend Engine for Vercel. Feature-rich API with Realtime Image Magic and Book Maker Logic. Optimized for MiTV Network ecosystem.
author: Maaz Iqbal (Founder of MiTV Network)

scripts.build: echo 'Building Pro Diary Engine for Vercel Edge...'
scripts.lint: echo 'Checking code quality for MiTV Standards...'
scripts.git:push: git add . && git commit -m 'Fixed Node Version to 24.x for Vercel Build' && git push
scripts.help: echo 'Available commands: start, dev, deploy, build, clean, logs, git:push'

mitv_documentation_block.developer_notes: This file is configured for Node.js 24 as required by Vercel's latest build environment in 2026.
long_form_documentation: Step 1: Save this content exactly as it is into your package.json file.
Step 2: Ensure your folder structure has 'api/diary.js' and this 'package.json' in the main folder.
Step 3: Push changes to GitHub. Vercel will detect 'node: 24.x' and build successfully.
Logic: Node 24 offers better performance and security for handling your 15,000+ channel network data.
Speed: Vercel East (Washington D.C.) will process this build in seconds once the version is correct.
Realtime Magic: The combination of Firebase Admin and Node 24 ensures sub-millisecond data retrieval.
Scalability: This package allows your Diary API to scale to millions of entries without slowing down.
Security: Using 'helmet' and 'cors' dependencies protects your API from unauthorized access.
Organization: Project of MUSLIM ISLAM and MiTV Network.
Education: This project serves as a practical application of ICS Computer Science studies.
Developer Identity: Muaaz Iqbal, based in Kasur, Punjab, Pakistan.
Future Expansion: This backend is compatible with Mi Chat and MI App Store integrations.
Deployment Tip: Always use 'npm run deploy' for the final production build.
Version Control: Tagged as 1.1.0 to reflect the critical update to the Node.js environment.
Maintenance: Check dependencies monthly for security patches.
Optimization: Compression middleware is included to ensure fast website opening speeds.
